top_signals.title: Tencent-Backed Fintech Uzum Plans New Funding Round by Year-End
top_signals.summary: Uzbek fintech Uzum, backed by investors including China’s Tencent Holdings Ltd., aims to hold another funding round as the group seeks to support rapid expansion plans ahead of a potential initial public offering.
